summary: The target repair candidate keeps its scope on cellular_senescence and senolytics, and its proposed candidate-change update preserves the same hallmark and track mapping while only recording the unresolved review-lane state. No taxonomy drift or intervention-level overreach was found.

findings.claim_or_issue: The target candidate and its proposed update are both scoped to hallmark cellular_senescence and track senolytics.
findings.why_it_matters: The repair concerns a senolytics scaffold candidate and does not introduce a broader disease, intervention, or evidence domain outside the declared cellular-senescence senolytics track.
findings.recommended_action: No taxonomy correction is required for this lane; keep the candidate in needs_revision until the other required review lanes are complete.
